roa.docketEntryComment: Complaint
Minute Order

COURT OF APPEAL Remittitur Received - SENTENCE AND THE Judgment ARE Affirmed.  THE SUPERIOR COURT IS DIRECTED TO PREPARE AN AMENDED ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT THAT REFLECTS IMPOSITION OF A $300 STAYED FINE UNDER SECTION 1202.4, AND A $300 STAYED FINEUNDER SECTION 1202.45, AND THAT CORRECTLY RECORDS MALBROUGH'S CONVICTION FOR VIOLATING VEHICLE CODE SECTION 20001, SUBDIVISIONS (a) AND (b)(2).  A CERTIFIED COPY OF THE CORRECTED ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT SHALL BE FORWARDED TO THE DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS AND REHABILITATION.

Minute Order

Remittitur Received, THE JUDGMENT IS REVERSED AND THE MATTER IS REMANDED FOR RESENTENCING UNDER THE NEWLY AMENDED VERSION OF SECTION 1170.  FOLLOWING RESENTENCING, THE TRIAL COURT IS DIRECTED TO PREPARE AN AMENDED ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT.  THE AMENDED ABSTRACT SHALL BE FORWARDED TO THE DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS AND REHABILITATION.  IN ALL OTHER RESPECTS, THE JUDGMENT IS AFFIRMED.
Held to Answer
